title: Bootstrap Waystation ledger files
description: Create the initial hand-written Waystation project ledger so Waystation can be used to build Waystation before the CLI exists.
acceptance: Initial scopes, prompts, tasks, events, reports, and context files exist.
The task list describes the V1 implementation path.
notes: Completed manually as the first dogfooding step. The ledger was later consolidated from YAML to JSON (task-migrate-ledger-json).
